queries.question: Provide a list of all software developer roles and also provide a list of all data analyst roles with a entry level grade.
queries.sql:
SELECT Roles.title 
FROM Roles
WHERE Roles.Technology_Career = "Software Developer" OR Roles.Technology_Career = "Data Analyst" AND Roles.Grade = "Entry"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?roles a :Roles .
  ?roles p:title ?title .
  ?roles p:Technology_Career ?technology_career_w .
  ?roles p:Technology_Career ?technology_career_w2 .
  ?roles p:Grade ?grade_w .
  FILTER((STR(?technology_career_w) = "Software Developer" || (STR(?technology_career_w2) = "Data Analyst" && STR(?grade_w) = "Entry")))
}

queries.question: What are the software developer roles and data analyst roles that are entry level?
queries.sql:
SELECT Roles.title 
FROM Roles
WHERE (Roles.Technology_Career = "Software Developer" OR Roles.Technology_Career = "Data Analyst") AND Roles.Grade = "Entry"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?roles a :Roles .
  ?roles p:title ?title .
  ?roles p:Technology_Career ?technology_career_w .
  ?roles p:Technology_Career ?technology_career_w2 .
  ?roles p:Grade ?grade_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?technology_career_w) = "Software Developer" || STR(?technology_career_w2) = "Data Analyst")) && STR(?grade_w) = "Entry"))
}
